Name: Mate's Education Pvt Ltd
Desc:
[

Mates International Education and Visa Services

,

Mate’s Education Pvt. Ltd is one of the pioneer education consultancies of Nepal that helps Nepali students obtain “Admission & Student Visa” to go to different countries, mainly Australia, Canada, UK, and New Zealand. What makes us unique is our ‘equal support’ to those returning to settle back in Nepal by grabbing the new career opportunities or unique business startup ideas. Hence, we are here to help you while going abroad to Learn to Achieve your dream, Earn the Recognition of your successful dignity and even if you wish to Return to Reflect your education, experience, and expertise in Nepal. Abroad Study Plan is not like reading one book or watching one movie or visiting your favorite place for leisure activities. More specifically, it’s not a matter of short span of time.

,

Instead, it’s a matter of your whole life which is based on your one particular ‘action’ that decides ‘what kind of life’ you will live ahead as consequences. In short, Abroad Study Plan is the “The Transition Phase” of your life which is based on your today’s action and that action is – Choosing the right consultancy.

,

There are thousands of education consultancies in the market and most of them were, perhaps, born yesterday. Nothing wrong with that, but if your whole Life is going to depend on that Consultancy and their Counselors, you should always choose the one that has a History, the Experience, The Team and the one that can ‘Assure’ your future in abroad or even when you return to Nepal. Like we said, we are here to assist you go and here to assist you return – as your Guide & as your Mate. But we are here in the whole journey of your lifetime.

,

Mates an educational consultancy, moreover an organization in itself is taken as an epitome in the field of abroad studies. The services rendered by this organization is considered as the reliable one which has made numerous students climb the staircase of Mates.

]

Name: Netco Technology Pvt Ltd
Desc:
[

Introduction Netco Technology Pvt. Ltd. (NETCOTECH) in Nepal was established in year 2003 with vision to gear towards placing Nepal in the Global Market by focusing on quality education & Training, Overseas Educational Consultancy including Global IT Certification courses, and software development, Since its inception, it is planning towards working in partnership with the corporate sector, while retaining its IT solutions freedom and placing NETCOTECH as a Total Software, Hardware Solution Provider and Education Consultants Along with that NETCOTECH is an Authorized Prometric Testing center, Microsoft Gold Partner, Red hat Authorized Training Partner, Mission Our mission is to become a leading IT solution provider, trainer and Educational Consultants with quality services to achieve total customer satisfaction in national and international marketplace. Moreover, it includes assisting all the trainees seeking IT education to attain their personal, educational and career goals using the latest technology means in the shortest time, affordable fees and the most effective manner. The aim is not only to educate but also to provide a proper foundation that will help to equip for work as professionals. We have a cadre of professional trainers, application developers, experienced abroad counselor that have the in-depth specialized experience and knowledge in the field of Information Technology and overseas study . We strive to be an organization of excellence to our customers, partners, fellow colleagues and society. Location Netco Technology Pvt. Ltd. (NETCOTECH) Head office is located at Adwaitmarg in Putalisadak-31 way to Shanker Dev Campus from Old Bus Park,behind LAW Campus, Central part of the Capital with Total physical area of 4000 square feet with ample of space for both the Training and Parking Purposes as well. Which is one of the most popular commercial centres in Kathmandu Moreover, the place where the NetcoTech is located is calm and peaceful for getting education, in terms of infrastructures and services. Strategy Our Strategy is to establish ourselves as a global solution provider in the information technology and consultancy service market aiming for excellence. We shall accomplish this through application of technology, motivation and continuous improvement of our knowledge and skill. Further plan is to expand our branches in different major cities like Pokhara, Butwal, Nepaljung, Mahendranagar, Birjung and Biratnagar within a year, which proves that NETCOTECH, has a strong presence all over NEPAL with a network of offices located in all the major cities of Nepal Training Netco Technology conducts different training courses with fully equipped laboratory along with multimedia projector. Apart from being a computer training institute Netco Technology is an authorized Prometric Testing Center, Microsoft Certified Gold Partner, Redhat Training Partner, so is facilitated with the separate laboratory for separate faculty i.e. for test preparation, for MCSE training, for RHCE training. For full time courses and other individual course along with CISCO training, Netco Technology has six Laboratories each containing 10-15 computers. College Accreditation and Partners • Authorized Thomson Prometric Testing Centre • Microsoft Certified Gold Partner • Redhat Training Partner • FACT Authorized Training Partner • Member of Computer Association of Nepal(CAN) • Member of ECAN • Raffles Academy Singapore • Group College of Australia • University of Balart (Australia) • Australian Catholic University (Australia) • Center Queensland University (Australia) • University of North Alabama UNA (USA) • Florida International University(USA) • Lewis Clerk State College USA • Martin Greenwich College London(UK) • Nottingham Trent University (UK) • International University Japan • Millennium city Academy(UK) • London Graduate School of Management(UK) • Global Education Services Inc USA(International students recruitment Agency ) • THE HUB IMMIGRATION&EDUCATION INFORMATION CENTER (Australia) NETCOTECH represent over 150 world premier Universities and Colleges around the world. 1 United Kingdom 2 United States of America 3 Canada 4 Australia 5 New Zealand 6 Ireland 7 Switzerland 8 The Netherlands 9 Singapore Salient Features • Highly Equipped, modern class room. • Qualified, multilingual and caring teachers. • A friendly and supportive learning environment. • Unlimited Internet facility for NETCOTECH Students. • We offer more than 50 Number of courses. • Competitive price. • Centrally Located. • Library Facilities. Abroad Study Established in 2003, Netco Technology (NETCOTECH) Pvt. Ltd. is one of the leading overseas education consultants in NEPAL representing over 150 world premier Universities around the world. For the past 2-3 years, we have been sending hundreds of students every year to various highly reputed Universities/ Colleges in UK, Ireland, USA, Australia, New Zealand, Canada, Switzerland, The Netherlands, Singapore and Japan. l NETCOTECH head office located at Putalisadak-31 KTM which is one of the most popular commercial centre in Kathmandu and branch offices located in Balaju, Baneshwor, and Lalitpur, This has enabled us to reach out to a much wider population of the student market and provide them our services in the fields of career counseling, visa assistance, travel assistance and admissions at the Undergraduate Graduate and Postgraduate levels. NETCOTECH has been dedicated to the cause of providing personalised consultancy to students as well as parents, at all stages of studying abroad, from School to University level and have sent more than hundred students to Universities/ Colleges of UK every year in the past. NETCOTECH offers a unique range of services dedicated to advising parents and school at all stages of education abroad from pre-school to post-university. Each year we receive hundreds of enquiries from students for overseas study. Most of our clients contact us after personal recommendations from friends and relatives who are familiar with our services; others are reffered to us by other advisory sevices, international organizations or diplomatic representatives. Every student has individual requirements, but in order to ensure a well-informed choice there are almost always special factors to consider, including a student's academic background, age, knowledge of English, when to come to the university or college, the length of the student's stay in the university/college and what, where and how he/she wishes to study. We assist students with all aspects of planning and arranging for their study overseas. OUR LOCATION Netco Technology Pvt. Ltd. (NETCOTECH) In Kathmandu, Nepal is located at Adwait Marg in Putalisadak-31 way to Shanker Dev Campus from Old Bus Park,Behind LAW Campus, Central part of the Capital with Total physical area of 4000 square feet with ample of space for both the Training and Parking Purposes as well. Moreover, the place where the NetcoTech is located is calm and peaceful for getting education, in terms of infrastructures and services. Contact Us Visit the www.netco.edu.np Website Netco Techonology Pvt.Ltd. Adwait Marg, Putalisadak-31, Katmandu P hone : 977-01-4241213, 4241293 email: netcos@wlink.com.np /abroad@netco.edu.np Netco Techonology (Balaju Centre) Manamaiju Marga, Madhev Khola Balaju, Katmandu, Nepal email: info@netco.edu.np /balaju@netco.edu.np Netco Techonology (Baneshwor Centre) Baneshwor Opposite to BICC HALL Kathmandu, Nepal email: info@netco.edu.np /baneshwor@netco.edu.np Netco Techonology (Lalitpur Centre) Kumaripati,Lalitpur, Nepal email: info@netco.edu.np lalitpur@netco.edu.np

Name: Oli And Associates Pvt. Ltd.
Desc:
[

Established in 2002, Oli & Associates is a complete international education service provider that delivers quality educational services in the global arena. Headquartered in Sydney, Australia, our branches spread across Nepal, Australia and Bhutan.

,

Our committed team at Oli & Associates works tirelessly every day to realise the dreams of hundreds of students. We are excellent at counselling, partnerships, affiliations, and collaborations because of our knowledge and experience in international education.

,

Oli & Associates was founded in 2002 by Mr. Bhabani Prasad Oli in Australia. Oli & Associates is Nepal’s leading trusted education consultancy for study abroad from Nepal. With 24 years of experience, we are a pioneer in promoting study abroad and have helped over 30,000 clients to achieve their dreams of studying abroad and settling in Australia, Canada, the UK, the USA, and New Zealand.

,

Canada is one of the best education destinations for international students. Canada currently hosts around 642000 international students as of September 2020. Canada is home to hundred thousands of students throughout the globe for the following reasons.

,

With less expensive living and tuition than the USA, UK, Australia, or Canada, New Zealand is becoming a popular choice for students seeking an affordable, high-quality education. Its eight QS-ranked universities provide internationally recognised degrees in a stunning, safe nation with low admission standards.

,

,

,

The cost of education, in particular, is very competitive, which means that in New Zealand, you can afford a world-class education with a very competitive price tag. The cost would range anywhere between NZ$ 14,500 to NZ$ 19,500 per year. This would vary from institutions to institutions and course to course.

,

Name: Fast Track Education Consultancy Pvt Ltd.
Wide Range Consultancy Pvt Ltd
Desc:
[

Wide Range Consultancy is a Nepal Government registered Consultancy run by well experienced and well qualified Professional Managers and Counselors that provides firsthand information and Placement services at international institutions abroad. Their Personalized services are providing information about various study options, student guidance and orientation, financial scholarship and health insurance assistance, and visits to national and international Colleges/Universities in India, Bangladesh, China, Kazakhstan, Philippines, and Taiwan. They also offer bank loan assistance, airport picks up and after arrival services, opening bank accounts, submitting documents, and getting TRC, the orientation of Study.

,

The Chairman of Wide Range Consultancy is Mr. Sudeep Kumar Nayak. Some of the tie-ups with Universities abroad of this education Consultancy are VIT University Vellore, SRM University Chennai, Jain University, KIIT, MM University, Dhaka Medical College, Nanchang University, Dali University, Hebei Medical University, Jinzhou Medical University.

,

Wide Range Consultancy also complies with the DASA scheme which offers Direct admission to foreign nationals in Undergraduate Engineering, Information technology, and Architecture programs of reputed institutions such as the National Institutes of Technology, and the Indian Institute of Information technology, centrally funded institutions.
